results.title: Ralph Recto: P60-B fund transfer didn't affect PhilHealth operations
results.description: Executive Secretary Ralph Recto on Friday maintained that he is not liable over the P60 billion PhilHealth fund transfer to the National Treasury during his tenure as Finance chief, saying such transfer did not affect the state insurer"s operations.

results.title: Amazon points to water conservation steps in India amid data centre scrutiny
results.description: MUMBAI, June 19 : Amazon said on Friday its Indian operations had reached a major milestone in water conservation, at a time when global tech giants face increasing pressure over their expansion of resource-hungry AI data centres.The U.S.-based company announced it had turned "water positive" in India this ye
